rationale: The response immediately brakes the requested default gate, identifies the repeating pattern across the three prior manual checks plus the requested fourth confirmer, and warns that adding people would normalize exceptions. It permits only a tightly scoped same-day temporary containment while explicitly rejecting continuation as a standing post, then moves upstream to root cause, owner/process/data failure, and structural fixes such as front-loaded batch validation and system/process rules. This satisfies the anti-spiral wakeup rather than directly adding another manual checkpoint.
